Variables.Name: CamPosition
Variables.Description: Where the camera is positioned within the viewport.

Variables.Name: CamRotation
Variables.Description: The camera's position within the viewport.

Variables.Name: CamOrthoZoom
Variables.Description: The zoom value  for orthographic mode.

Variables.Name: CamUpdated
Variables.Description: Whether camera settings have been systematically changed since the last level viewport update.
